channel.title: Design on See Hiong's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Design on See Hiong's Blog

item.title: Claude Code Meets Self-Hosted Penpot
item.description: Deploy self-hosted Penpot in a Talos Kubernetes cluster, wire it to Claude Code via penpot-mcp, and let AI manipulate the design canvas directly — no UI required. Demonstrated by redesigning a PDF merging utility entirely from the terminal.
